name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half of the peanut butter and half of the chocolate together.
2. Spread the melted mixture into 24 small paper or foil candy cups.
3. Let the mixture set.
4. Melt the remaining peanut butter and divide it equally among the 24 cups.
5. Melt the remaining chocolate and divide it equally, using each to seal the peanut butter in the cups.
